title: HEAD Requests to the Monday.com API Fail with HTTP Code 500
excerpt:
Making an HTTP HEAD request to https://api.monday.com/v2/ (with the Authorization header correctly set to a Monday.com API key) fails with HTTP code 500. 
This is a recent issue that broke an integration of mine, affecti…

posts.author: danielshawellis (Daniel Ellis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Making an HTTP HEAD request to https://api.monday.com/v2/ (with the Authorization header correctly set to a Monday.com API key) fails with HTTP code 500.

This is a recent issue that broke an integration of mine, affecting a number of my users. I can confirm that authenticated HEAD requests to the https://api.monday.com/v2/ route were working fairly recently (they were returning HTTP code 200).

Please let me know if intend to fix this issue.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @danielshawellis,

The 500 error can mean lots of different things.

Would you be able to please send an email to appsupport@monday.com including your full query/mutation with the full response you get from our server?

We can take a look from there

Cheers,
Matias
